# 3six9studio

> AI product video and photography studio based in Drama, Greece, serving Greece, Cyprus and Europe. We create advertising videos and product photography with artificial intelligence for e-commerce stores (eshops) and brands — delivered in 48–72 hours, with no physical studio or photographer.

## Services

- AI product videos: ad videos for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube and product pages, delivered in 48–72 hours with no shoot. Vertical, square or landscape.
- AI product photography: lifestyle shots, white-background images and catalog visuals in any setting, at high resolution.
- Branded campaigns: teasers, brand films, animated logos and seasonal content.
- Bulk / at-scale content: 20 to 100+ assets with a consistent look, for large catalogs, franchise networks and multi-SKU brands.

## Service area

Greece, Cyprus, Germany and the wider Europe. Based in Drama, Greece. Collaboration is handled remotely.
